subject: Revert "[CCSDK/CDS] Bump CDS charts to Guilin version"
commit_message:
Revert "[CCSDK/CDS] Bump CDS charts to Guilin version"

Revert submission 113061-change-112626-6

Reason for revert: e2e tests are broken by Guilin SDNC versions

I8d660a8e3:[SDNC/CCSDK] Guilin version bump
Ide8b60615:[CCSDK/CDS] Bump CDS charts to Guilin version

Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

VNF-API was deprecated in Frankfurt and is now removed in Guilin.  This decision was announced to the onap-discuss mailing list, documented in our Frankfurt release notes, and reviewed at our Guilin architecture review.
